testcase.classname: Database Module getAllExpenditures should return empty array when no data exists
testcase.name: Database Module getAllExpenditures should return empty array when no data exists

testcase.classname: Database Module getAllExpenditures should return all expenditures when data exists
testcase.name: Database Module getAllExpenditures should return all expenditures when data exists

testcase.classname: Database Module getAllExpenditures should handle malformed JSON gracefully
testcase.name: Database Module getAllExpenditures should handle malformed JSON gracefully

testcase.classname: Database Module getAllExpenditures should handle file read errors gracefully
testcase.name: Database Module getAllExpenditures should handle file read errors gracefully

testcase.classname: Database Module addExpenditure should add new expenditure with generated ID
testcase.name: Database Module addExpenditure should add new expenditure with generated ID

testcase.classname: Database Module addExpenditure should increment ID for multiple additions
testcase.name: Database Module addExpenditure should increment ID for multiple additions

testcase.classname: Database Module addExpenditure should preserve existing properties when adding
testcase.name: Database Module addExpenditure should preserve existing properties when adding

testcase.classname: Database Module addExpenditure should handle file write errors gracefully
testcase.name: Database Module addExpenditure should handle file write errors gracefully

testcase.classname: Database Module addExpenditure should validate required fields are present
testcase.name: Database Module addExpenditure should validate required fields are present

testcase.classname: Database Module Data Persistence should persist data between operations
testcase.name: Database Module Data Persistence should persist data between operations

testcase.classname: Database Module Data Persistence should maintain data integrity across multiple operations
testcase.name: Database Module Data Persistence should maintain data integrity across multiple operations

testcase.classname: Database Module Error Handling should handle concurrent access gracefully
testcase.name: Database Module Error Handling should handle concurrent access gracefully

testcase.classname: Database Module Error Handling should handle large datasets efficiently
testcase.name: Database Module Error Handling should handle large datasets efficiently
